Container.Name: MagguuBot

Branch.TagDescription: Stable build from main (auto-published via GitHub Actions)

Container.Overview: Discord bot for the download side of a media homelab (Sonarr / Radarr / Seerr / Tautulli / SABnzbd) with moderation, XP/leveling, reminders, reaction-role panels, starboard, automod, welcome/audit, and a GitHub webhook feed. Ships with an optional MEE6-style admin dashboard (Discord OAuth2 login, warnings/XP/webhook views) at DASHBOARD_BASE_URL. Channel IDs are auto-discovered + persisted by /setup-server into SQLite — no template edits required for channel routing. Single container, runs headless with an append-only activity log under /app/data.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port that receives webhooks from *arr services + SABnzbd + GitHub. Only expose to LAN. Containers on the same Docker network reach it via http://MagguuBot:3000 without any port mapping.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: SQLite database + WAL files. Persists channel config, warnings, reminders, XP, webhook history across container rebuilds.

Config.Name: DISCORD_TOKEN
Config.Description: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal (Applications -> your app -> Bot -> Reset Token). Treat as a password.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Application ID from Discord Developer Portal (Applications -> your app -> General).

Config.Name: DISCORD_GUILD_ID
Config.Description: Your Discord server ID. Enable Developer Mode in Discord, right-click the server icon, Copy Server ID.

Config.Name: WEBHOOK_SECRET
Config.Description: Shared secret required in X-Magguu-Token header on every /webhook/* call. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32 (minimum 16 chars).

Config.Name: GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Config.Description: HMAC secret for the /webhook/github endpoint. Set the same value in each GitHub repo's Settings -> Webhooks -> Secret. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32. Leave empty to disable the GitHub feed.

Config.Name: DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: Discord Developer Portal -> OAuth2 -> Client Secret (Reset then paste). Required for the admin dashboard login. Leave empty to disable the dashboard entirely.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Signs the HTTP-only session cookie for dashboard logins. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32 (minimum 16 chars). Rotate to invalidate all sessions.

Config.Name: ADMIN_USER_IDS
Config.Description: Comma-separated Discord user IDs allowed to log into the dashboard. Enable Developer Mode in Discord, right-click your profile, Copy User ID.

Config.Name: DASHBOARD_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Public HTTPS URL where the dashboard is reachable (e.g. https://bot.example.com). Must exactly match the redirect URI you added in Discord Developer Portal -> OAuth2 -> Redirects (with /auth/callback appended).

Config.Name: SONARR_URL
Config.Description: Sonarr base URL. http://sonarr:8989 works when both containers share a Docker network, otherwise http://UNRAID-IP:8989.

Config.Name: SONARR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Sonarr API key from Settings -> General. Required for /queue and /search show.

Config.Name: RADARR_URL
Config.Description: Radarr base URL.

Config.Name: RADARR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Radarr API key from Settings -> General.

Config.Name: SEERR_URL
Config.Description: Jellyseerr / Overseerr base URL. Required for Seerr approve/decline buttons.

Config.Name: SEERR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Seerr API key from Settings -> General.

Config.Name: SAB_URL
Config.Description: SABnzbd base URL. Used by /queue for the live slot list.

Config.Name: SAB_API_KEY
Config.Description: SABnzbd API key from Config -> General -> Security.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log level: trace | debug | info | warn | error | fatal

Config.Name: NODE_ENV
Config.Description: Keep as 'production' on Unraid.

Config.Name: HTTP_HOST
Config.Description: Interface to bind the webhook server to.

Config.Name: HTTP_PORT
Config.Description: Internal port of the webhook server (must match the port mapping above).

Config.Name: DATABASE_PATH
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container (maps through AppData).
